[?2004lstatic const std::unordered_map<std::string, size_t> kClangTokens{
  { "eof", antlr4::Token::EOF },
  { "int", kInt },
  { "identifier", kIdentifier },
  { "l_paren", kLeftParen },
  { "r_paren", kRightParen },
  { "return", kReturn },
  { "r_brace", kRightBrace },
  { "l_brace", kLeftBrace },
  { "numeric_constant", kConstant },
  { "semi", kSemi },
  { "equal", kEqual },
  { "plus", kPlus },
  { "minus", kMinus },
  { "comma", kComma },
  { "l_square", kLeftBracket },
  { "r_square", kRightBracket }
};
